Income.text: The Gross Income Limit for a household of 1 is 200% of the Federal Poverty Level, which is $2,430/mo in California.

Deductions.text: The Standard Utility Allowance (SUA) in California is approximately $600.

Income.text: The Gross Income Limit for a household of 1 is 200% of the Federal Poverty Level, which is $2,430/mo in New York.

Deductions.text: The Standard Utility Allowance (SUA) in New York is $850+ for eligible households.
